The '''Corellian Buccaneer''' was a [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] manufactured by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] around the founding of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Its design was based on that of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], and it was armed with ten double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]]. [[Elta Besk]] owned a Corellian Buccaneer known as the ''[[Solar Dynamica]]''.
